name: @aqua/plugin-onboarding-checklist
description: Per-client agency-customisable onboarding checklist for Epic Intro + Blueprint phases. Distinct from the foundation onboarding dashboard (phase milestones); this is bespoke per-client items split by agency-vs-customer ownership. Soft-pairs with @aqua/plugin-kanban (client-tasks board) and emits onboarding.* activity events.
